item.title: The Seesaw First Five Days
item.description:
The Seesaw First Five Days

francinegoldsteinmarketblog:

January 8, 2015

Happy new year! Volatility is alive and well!

Let’s recap the first five days: the S&P 500 Index sold off 2.7% for the first three days and then surged 3.0% for the next two days.

The sharp stock market volatility has proved especially challenging for all but the nimblest…

Thanks for the advice, seems like a fairly low risk / low maintenance way to maintain a portfolio. I can’t wait to start investing, I just hope I don’t have to learn things the hard way.
